magic_link.subject_signup: Confirm your Coastal Brewing Co. account
magic_link.subject_login: Pull up to the counter — your Coastal sign-in link
magic_link.body:
Pull up to the counter.

Click below to sign in to your Coastal Brewing Co. account — same cup, new device, no password to remember.

{magic_link}

This link expires in {ttl_minutes} minutes and can only be used once. If you didn't ask to sign in, you can ignore this email — your account stays as it is.

Real fine — Coastal Brewing Co.
